extensions.name: Particles Tools
extensions.description: AI MCP tools for Godot GpuParticles (2D & 3D): create, configure, start/stop, and inspect emitters.

tools.name: particles-defaults
tools.description: Return the recommended starter config for a 2D/3D emitter.

tools.name: particles-create
tools.description: Create a GpuParticles2D/GpuParticles3D node in the edited scene.

tools.name: particles-configure
tools.description: Update an emitter's scalar properties (clamped to valid ranges).

tools.name: particles-set-emitting
tools.description: Start or stop emission, optionally restarting first.

tools.name: particles-get
tools.description: Read an emitter's scalar config (read-only).

extensions.name: Tilemap Tools
extensions.description: AI MCP tools for Godot TileMapLayer (4.3+): create layers, assign tilesets, set/erase cells, and inspect used cells.

tools.name: tilemap-create
tools.description: Create a TileMapLayer node in the currently edited Godot scene.

tools.name: tilemap-set-tileset
tools.description: Assign a TileSet resource to an existing TileMapLayer.

tools.name: tilemap-set-cell
tools.description: Set a single cell on a TileMapLayer (by map + atlas coords).

tools.name: tilemap-erase-cell
tools.description: Erase a single cell on a TileMapLayer (set it back to empty).

tools.name: tilemap-get-used-cells
tools.description: List the used (non-empty) cells of a TileMapLayer (read-only).

tools.name: tilemap-clear
tools.description: Clear all cells on a TileMapLayer (the assigned TileSet is kept).

extensions.name: Navigation Tools
extensions.description: AI MCP tools for Godot navigation (2D & 3D): create regions, agents, and links, set region meshes, configure agents, and inspect navigation nodes.

tools.name: navigation-defaults
tools.description: Return the recommended starter config (radius, distances, max speed) for a 2D/3D NavigationAgent.

tools.name: navigation-region-create
tools.description: Create a NavigationRegion2D/NavigationRegion3D node (a navigable area) in the edited scene.

tools.name: navigation-region-set-mesh
tools.description: Assign a region's navigation resource (NavigationPolygon in 2D, NavigationMesh in 3D).

tools.name: navigation-agent-create
tools.description: Create a NavigationAgent2D/NavigationAgent3D node (pathfinding + avoidance) in the edited scene.

tools.name: navigation-agent-configure
tools.description: Update a NavigationAgent's scalar properties (clamped to valid ranges).

tools.name: navigation-link-create
tools.description: Create a NavigationLink2D/NavigationLink3D node (an off-mesh connection between two points).

tools.name: navigation-get
tools.description: Read a navigation node's scalar config (read-only).

extensions.name: Animation Tools
extensions.description: AI MCP tools for Godot AnimationPlayer: create players, libraries, and animations, add tracks, insert keyframes, and inspect them.

tools.name: animation-defaults
tools.description: Return the recommended starter config (length, loop mode) for a new animation.

tools.name: animation-player-create
tools.description: Create an AnimationPlayer node in the currently edited Godot scene.

tools.name: animation-library-add
tools.description: Add a new empty AnimationLibrary to an existing AnimationPlayer.

tools.name: animation-create
tools.description: Create an Animation in an AnimationPlayer's library (auto-created when missing).

tools.name: animation-add-track
tools.description: Add a value or 3D transform track to an existing Animation.

tools.name: animation-insert-key
tools.description: Insert a keyframe on an animation track.

tools.name: animation-get
tools.description: Read an AnimationPlayer's libraries, animations, and a clip's tracks (read-only).

extensions.name: CSG Tools
extensions.description: AI MCP tools for Godot CSG (Constructive Solid Geometry): create box/sphere/cylinder primitives and combiners, set boolean operations, and inspect them.

tools.name: csg-defaults
tools.description: Return the recommended starter config (size / radius / height / segments) for a CSG node of the requested kind.

tools.name: csg-box-create
tools.description: Create a CsgBox3D primitive in the currently edited Godot scene.

tools.name: csg-sphere-create
tools.description: Create a CsgSphere3D primitive in the currently edited Godot scene.

tools.name: csg-cylinder-create
tools.description: Create a CsgCylinder3D primitive in the currently edited Godot scene.

tools.name: csg-combiner-create
tools.description: Create a CsgCombiner3D container that groups child CSG shapes for boolean ops.

tools.name: csg-set-operation
tools.description: Set an existing CSG node's boolean operation (Union / Intersection / Subtraction).

tools.name: csg-get
tools.description: Read a CSG node's scalar config (read-only).

extensions.name: GridMap Tools
extensions.description: AI MCP tools for Godot GridMap (3D tile-based maps): create, set/clear cells, assign a MeshLibrary, and inspect.

tools.name: gridmap-defaults
tools.description: Return the recommended starter configuration for a new GridMap node.

tools.name: gridmap-create
tools.description: Create a GridMap node in the currently edited Godot scene.

tools.name: gridmap-set-mesh-library
tools.description: Assign a MeshLibrary resource to an existing GridMap node.

tools.name: gridmap-set-cell
tools.description: Set a single cell of a GridMap to a MeshLibrary item.

tools.name: gridmap-clear-cell
tools.description: Clear a single cell of a GridMap.

tools.name: gridmap-clear
tools.description: Clear all cells of a GridMap.

tools.name: gridmap-get
tools.description: Read a GridMap's scalar config (read-only).

extensions.name: PhantomCamera Tools
extensions.description: AI MCP tools for the Godot Phantom Camera addon (Cinemachine-style virtual cameras): create hosts and cameras, set follow/look-at targets and priority, and inspect them.

tools.name: phantomcamera-defaults
tools.description: Return the recommended starter config (priority, follow/look-at mode, damping) for a Phantom Camera.

tools.name: phantomcamera-host-create
tools.description: Ensure a PhantomCameraHost exists under a Camera3D in the edited scene (required by the addon).

tools.name: phantomcamera-create
tools.description: Create a PhantomCamera3D node (a virtual camera) in the currently edited Godot scene.

tools.name: phantomcamera-set-follow
tools.description: Set an existing PhantomCamera3D's follow mode and/or follow target.

tools.name: phantomcamera-set-look-at
tools.description: Set an existing PhantomCamera3D's look-at mode and/or look-at target.

tools.name: phantomcamera-set-priority
tools.description: Set an existing PhantomCamera3D's priority (higher wins; raising it switches the active camera).

tools.name: phantomcamera-get
tools.description: Read an existing PhantomCamera3D's scalar config (read-only).

extensions.name: Beehave Tools
extensions.description: AI MCP tools for the Godot Beehave addon (behaviour-tree AI): scaffold a tree root, add composites, decorators, and leaf placeholders, and inspect them.

tools.name: beehave-defaults
tools.description: Return the recommended starter skeleton (root, tick rate, a composite, and leaf placeholders) for a Beehave behaviour tree.

tools.name: beehave-tree-create
tools.description: Create a BeehaveTree behaviour-tree root in the currently edited Godot scene.

tools.name: beehave-add-composite
tools.description: Add a Selector/Sequence composite under an existing tree or composite.

tools.name: beehave-add-decorator
tools.description: Add an Inverter/Limiter decorator under an existing tree or composite.

tools.name: beehave-add-leaf
tools.description: Add an Action/Condition leaf placeholder under a composite or decorator.

tools.name: beehave-get
tools.description: Read a BeehaveTree's scalar config and dump its tree structure (read-only).

extensions.name: Dialogic Tools
extensions.description: AI MCP tools for the Godot Dialogic addon (dialogue / visual novels): create timeline and character resources, append text events, and inspect them.

tools.name: dialogic-defaults
tools.description: Return the recommended starter timeline and character config for Dialogic authoring.

tools.name: dialogic-timeline-create
tools.description: Create a Dialogic timeline resource (.dtl), seeded with a first text event.

tools.name: dialogic-character-create
tools.description: Create a Dialogic character resource (.dch) with a display name and color.

tools.name: dialogic-timeline-add-text
tools.description: Append a text event (optionally with a speaker) to an existing Dialogic timeline (.dtl).

tools.name: dialogic-get
tools.description: Read a Dialogic timeline (.dtl) or character (.dch) resource's config (read-only).
